title: YT medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4vgh9","text":"2xYT is a nutritionally rich liquid microbial growth medium used for propagation of recombinant strains of Escherichia coli and M13 bacteriophage or other filamentous single-stranded DNA bacteriophages.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":107,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"bho85","text":"Prepare enough for the necessary number of experiments to perform in order to prevent batch-to-batch variation between experiments. Input chemicals should be of a certain quality in order to prevent contaminants that can impact microbial growth and selection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"aa0hh","text":"Be sure to wear appropriate PPE when working with antibiotics and chemicals. Take care when working with hot flasks and tubes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fill the bottle with 400 mL deionized water

Measure and add: 8 g Tryptone 5 g Yeast extract 2.5 g Sodium chloride Powdered compounds: Tryptone Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #T9410 (CAS: 91079-40-2) Yeast Extract Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Y0875 Sodium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9625 (CAS: 7647-14-5)
Adjust pH to pH 7.0 by adding drops of concentrated NaOH
Add deionized water to a total of 500 mL
Autoclave liquid at 121 °C for 00:15:00 Cool to 50 °C and supplement with antibiotics as appropriate
creator: Andreas Sagen
